CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Re Joint Request For Entry Of [Proposed] Injunctiona Nd Judgment Pursuant Tpo Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Laura K. Lin, Esq. of Munger Tolles & Olson LLP, Tel. 415.512.4034, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF GUARDSMARK, LLC's Joint Request For Entry Of Injunction and Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction is off calendar per request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg
